title: Crystal Sphere
description:
[sine][blue]“I predicted you'd enter...!”[/blue][/sine]

A [jitter]raspy[/jitter] voice calls out as you enter a [purple]mystic hut[/purple].

[sine][blue]“Your destiny has brought you here. We must uncover your future and fortunes so you can SAVE US ALL!!”[/blue][/sine]
“Okay, here are the options for the [gold]Crystal Sphere reading[/gold]. Be sure to sign this waiver as well,” she says while bringing out pen and parchment.
conditions: All players have at least 100 Gold
notes:
The [gold]Uncover Future[/gold] cost is randomized each run: base [gold]50 Gold[/gold] plus a random addition of [gold]1–49 Gold[/gold], for a total range of [gold]51–99 Gold[/gold].

Both options lead into the [purple]Crystal Sphere minigame[/purple], where you reveal tiles to gain rewards (or suffer penalties). [gold]Uncover Future[/gold] grants [blue]3[/blue] divinations; [gold]Payment Plan[/gold] grants [blue]6[/blue] divinations at the cost of adding a [red]Debt[/red] curse to your deck.

[red]Debt[/red] is a curse that causes you to lose [gold]10 Gold[/gold] at the end of your turn if it is in your hand.
